reason: Trellis backend/UI entry-point checklist for the single-repo project.
Manual Library API and static assets live at the entry-point layer and must preserve dependency direction.
Testing and review expectations for focused browser-facing hardening.
Rebuild and upload failures must keep structured, safe user-facing errors.
Rebuild failures should preserve low-sensitive lifecycle fields and avoid raw document details.
Shared cross-layer and reuse guide index.
Upload/rebuild recovery crosses UI, API, queue, state, and storage signals.
Reuse existing diagnostics/rebuild helpers rather than adding parallel recovery flows.
